been in a board meeting where three people are looking at three different numbers for the same metric?

Not because anyone's wrong, but because no one formally owns what that metric actually means.

This is common #1 frustration we hear from CFOs.
It's not a technology problem. It's a definition problem.
The questions that break finance teams:

"How do we calculate EBITDA? Do we include depreciation from leased assets?"
"What counts as Marketing Cost? Just ad spend, or team salaries too?"
"When we say 'Customer,' is that one person globally, or per market?"

These aren't data questions. They're business questions.

Then you scale.

Once you need to manage 380 metrics across multiple countries, the real questions became:

→ Who approves when someone wants to change a definition?
→ How do you automate validation?
→ How do you get alerted when a KPI goes out of range?
→ How do you prevent the "which report is right?" debates?

Join us February 26 as Michal Hruška walks through a our framework for managing metrics at scale.

Konkurence je spousty.
Pokud se bavime jenom o zpracovavani dat, seznam bude nekonecny a kazdy tyden tam pribudou tri nove kousky. 
Nemusime to delas s GoodData, pointa je ze my z mnoha duvodu chceme. Treba v uzivatelske privetivosti a rychlosti nasazeni jsem zatim nevidel nic, co by zvladalo aspon podobne objemy dat se stejnou slozitosti vypoctu.
Udelal bych nejaky maly hackaton, pozval jeste nekoho s Tableau a QlikView, nadefinujeme nejake questy (od loadu dat az po nejake vysledky) a muzeme pomerit sily - rad se necham poucit! Pokud se bavime jenom o zpracovavani dat, seznam bude nekonecny a kazdy tyden tam pribudou tri nove kousky. 
Nemusime to delas s GoodData, pointa je ze my z mnoha duvodu chceme. Treba v uzivatelske privetivosti a rychlosti nasazeni jsem zatim nevidel nic, co by zvladalo aspon podobne objemy dat se stejnou slozitosti vypoctu.
Udelal bych nejaky maly hackaton, pozval jeste nekoho s Tableau a QlikView, nadefinujeme nejake questy (od loadu dat az po nejake vysledky) a muzeme pomerit sily - rad se necham poucit!
